Company Name: Eco Technology Environmental Protection Services LLC
Title: Sales Representative
Job Description:
Eco Technology Environmental Protection Services L.L.C. (EcoTech UAE) is a municipally approved environmental company based in the UAE, specializing in waste management, grease trap systems, used cooking oil recycling, and circular economy solutions. Operating in Ajman and Fujairah, EcoTech collaborates with municipalities, academic institutions, and the private sector to advance sustainability and public–private partnerships.


Role Description

We are seeking a Sales Representative to join our growing team in the United Arab Emirates. This is a full-time, on-site position responsible for developing new business opportunities, managing client relationships, and promoting EcoTech’s environmental services and sustainability solutions.


Key Responsibilities:


• Identify and approach potential clients across commercial, hospitality, and industrial sectors


• Build and maintain strong relationships with customers and partners


• Understand client needs and propose tailored environmental solutions


• Prepare quotations and sales proposals in coordination with the technical team


• Meet and exceed monthly sales targets and KPIs

• Maintain accurate client and sales records using CRM tools


• Contribute to marketing and partnership initiatives



Qualifications


• Proven sales and negotiation experience, preferably in environmental services or technical industries


• Excellent communication and customer relationship management skills


• Strong organizational and problem-solving abilities


• Strategic thinker with goal-oriented mindset


• Proficiency in Microsoft Office;

experience with CRM software is a plus


• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field


• Fluency in English and Arabic (Urdu or Hindi is an advantage)


• Candidate must have a valid UAE visa and driving license
